ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district the school belongs to */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "principal_name" TEXT /* Name of the school principal */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the school */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the school */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the school */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the school was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance report */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school the report belongs to */,
  "report_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of report (multi-year or single-year) */,
  "report_year" INTEGER /* Year the report was issued */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given to the school */,
  "points_earned" REAL /* Points earned by the school */,
  "participating_rating" TEXT /* Participation rating of the school */,
  "performance_watch" TEXT /* Whether the school is on performance watch */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status of the report */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Last revision date of the report */,
  "submitted_by" INTEGER /* User who submitted the report */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reports_rating FOREIGN KEY ("rating") REFERENCES ratings ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reports_participating_rating FOREIGN KEY ("participating_rating") REFERENCES participation_ratings ("participation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reports_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "rating_name" TEXT /* Name of the rating */,
  "rating_category" TEXT /* Category of the rating */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participation_ratings" (
  "participation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participation rating */,
  "participation_name" TEXT /* Name of the participation rating */,
  "minimum_participation_rate" REAL /* Minimum participation rate required for the rating */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the participation rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_watches" (
  "watch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance watch */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school on performance watch */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* User responsible for monitoring the performance watch */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the performance watch */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the performance watch */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the performance watch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_watches_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_watches_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the user belongs to */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, educator, analyst) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the report was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES performance_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
